pr.title: Add Claude Code case study + repo scaffolding
pr.body:
Full PM case study in claude-code/ — 7 sections + interactive prototype + self-contained HTML walkthrough.

Built via 8 parallel sub-agents (one per section + synthesis agent for walkthrough.html).

Content:
- 01-market-analysis.md — TAM/SAM math, 5-segment competitive map, 12-month forecasts
- 02-swot.md — 4-quadrant analysis with synthesis cross-links
- 03-opportunities.md — 9 opportunities ICE-scored; top-ranked: Team/Enterprise tier + GitHub PR Review App
- 04-prototype/ — interactive HTML mockup of async-agent fleet dashboard
- 05-evaluation.md — north-star (WAC-1 / PRs-merged), metric tree, 3-layer eval framework
- 06-risks.md — 10-row risk register, top-5 deep-dive, kill criteria with numeric thresholds
- 07-launch-plan.md — 22-row 90-day timeline, distribution, pricing, growth loops
- walkthrough.html — single self-contained showcase artifact (dark mode, ICE bars, responsive)

Key narrative: case study captures real PM judgment — initial hypothesis (Web + Async) updated to recommendation (Enterprise + GitHub PR App) once ICE-scored. The walkthrough frames this as a strength.

Root README scaffolds the broader portfolio (5 more case studies planned: Cursor, Granola, Perplexity, NotebookLM, Replit Agent).
pr.author: tracych
